parsed.production_notes: The video features a human presenter whose face appears heavily filtered or deepfaked, showing unnatural smoothness. It also includes a 3D-animated AI avatar and app interface screencasts.

characters.appearance: Young woman, mid-20s, slim build, fair skin, long wavy brown hair. Her facial features are consistent but appear slightly smoothed or filtered.
characters.wardrobe: Changes frequently: pink top with white cardigan, black/white patterned sweater, black dress, white turtleneck with green skirt, white blouse, white blazer.

characters.appearance: 3D animated female character. Blonde wavy hair, blue eyes, fair skin.

scenes.setting: Office environment, then a room with a wooden ceiling. Warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A stands indoors against a wooden ceiling and wall. She wears a pink top under a white cardigan. She looks directly at the camera with a slightly distressed, emotional expression. The lighting is warm and casts soft shadows.

scenes.visual_description: The scene starts with a quick shot of the presenter in an office, then cuts to her in a room with a wooden ceiling. Large, bold text overlays appear on screen emphasizing her hidden practice.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: 英語ペラペラって言われて嬉しい反面、実は裏ではめっちゃ練習してます... [While I'm happy to be told I'm fluent in English, I actually practice a lot behind the scenes...]
scenes.on_screen_text:
ペラペラって思われるけど... (People think I'm fluent, but...)
裏で練習してます... (I practice behind the scenes...)

scenes.setting: Stage, modern office hallway. Bright, natural lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A stands in a modern office hallway with glass walls and a red floor. She wears a white turtleneck, a dark green skirt, and black flats. She holds a small black object near her mouth, looking off-camera with a slight smile. The environment is brightly lit.

scenes.visual_description: A montage of quick cuts showing the presenter in different outfits and locations, simulating her practicing for presentations. Text overlays highlight the hours spent practicing.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: 周りには普通に話せているように見えるかもしれないんですけど、実は発表前とかめちゃくちゃ練習してます。 [It might look to others like I can speak normally, but actually, before a presentation, I practice a ton.]
scenes.on_screen_text: 何時間も練習してる (Practicing for hours)

scenes.setting: Various indoor rooms, including one with a hanging plant and an office. Mixed lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits indoors with a dark background; a hanging macrame planter is visible behind her. She wears a sheer white blouse. She looks at the camera with a concerned expression, gesturing slightly with her hands as if explaining a problem.

scenes.visual_description: Another montage of the presenter in different settings, looking frustrated or concerned while practicing alone. Text overlays emphasize the difficulty of checking pronunciation and the high cost of lessons.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: 一人で練習してても、発音とか表現が合ってるのかって判断できないし、誰かに見てほしいけど英会話レッスンってすごい高いじゃん？ [Even if I practice alone, I can't tell if my pronunciation or expressions are correct, and I want someone to look at it, but English conversation lessons are really expensive, right?]
scenes.on_screen_text:
発音や表現の確認ができない... (Can't check pronunciation or expressions...)
英会話は高い💸 (English conversation is expensive💸)

scenes.setting: Room with a wooden ceiling. Warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A stands indoors against a wooden ceiling. She wears a pink top under a white cardigan. She smiles broadly and points her right index finger upwards, looking directly at the camera.
A 3D animated blonde woman with blue eyes, Character B, smiles and waves her hand. She is set against a plain background.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter introduces her solution. An animated 3D avatar appears as an inset graphic. Later in the scene, an app icon is displayed prominently on screen.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: そんな私の秘密は、AIコーチにチェックしてもらうこと。最近私がめちゃくちゃ愛用しているFluentlyっていうアプリでは、 [My secret is having an AI coach check it. In an app called Fluently that I've been using a lot lately,]
scenes.on_screen_text:
AIコーチ (AI Coach)
愛用中のFluently👇 (Fluently, which I use regularly👇)

panels.panel_visual_description: A dark purple gradient background. At the top left is a small circular portrait of Character B. Below are rounded, empty chat bubble shapes arranged in a conversational layout.

scenes.visual_description: A screencast of a mobile app interface showing a chat conversation with the AI tutor. Text bubbles appear simulating a real-time conversation.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: AIコーチが発音とか言い回しをリアルタイムでチェックしてくれるんです。 [The AI coach checks your pronunciation and phrasing in real-time.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
※AIコーチと1日10分会話するだけ！ (*Just talk to the AI coach for 10 minutes a day!)
Hey ゆりあ！ How's your evening going so far? Got any fun dinner plans?
Ooh, nice! What's your presentation about this time?

scenes.setting: Room with a wooden ceiling, then an office setting. Warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A stands indoors against a wooden ceiling. She wears a pink top under a white cardigan. She smiles brightly at the camera, looking confident and enthusiastic.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter explains the final benefits of the app, with a brief cutaway to her in a white blazer. Large text overlays emphasize the key selling points. She ends by pointing towards the camera for a call to action.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: ただの会話練習じゃなくて、自然な言い換えも教えてくれるから、英語で話す力をつけたい方に本当におすすめです。英会話より圧倒的に安いのに、AIコーチとちょっとお話しするだけで圧倒的に英語力が上がります。詳しくは概要欄をチェックしてください！ [It's not just conversation practice, it also teaches you natural paraphrasing, so I highly recommend it to anyone who wants to build their English speaking skills. Even though it's overwhelmingly cheaper than English conversation lessons, just talking a little with the AI coach will overwhelmingly improve your English skills. Check the description box for details!]
scenes.on_screen_text:
自然な言い換えを提案 (Suggests natural paraphrasing)
英会話が一気に上達！ (English conversation improves at once!)
圧倒的に安い (Overwhelmingly cheap)
英語上級者の利用者も多い！ (Many advanced English users also use it!)
詳しくは概要欄へ！ (Check the description box for details!)
